text.title: Design Doc Writing Process Worked Example
text.summary: End-to-end worked example showing inputs → procedure → output for a typical instance of Design Doc Writing Process.

example.scenario: A solo engineer assigns @ruslan as reviewer (SLA 24h), writes the skeleton in 15 min, fills the body in 90 min, gets 8 comments (resolved 8: 6 accepted, 2 deferred with rationale), sign-off recorded with both handles + date.
example.trace: r1-four-passes → r3-reviewer-assigned-before-draft → r5-comment-resolution-tracked → r6-sign-off-recorded → artefact green
